name: ucp-checker
description: Check if any domain supports Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP). Returns verification status, manifest version, capabilities, response latency, and AI bot access policies (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended). Enables agent-to-tool compatibility for agentic commerce workflows.
